_comment: Settings for measure_run.py. CLI args override these. date: 'today'/null = today, else YYYY-MM-DD (not future). Run a market group with --market hk|us (uses that group's tickers). Ad-hoc: pass tickers positionally. output_language: report language (internal reasoning stays English). Telegram creds come from .env (TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID).
_cost_note: debate_report_mode: 'compact' condenses each analyst report (to debate_report_max_chars) before the 5 debate voices re-read them every turn — big input-token saving, full reports still kept in the HTML. Set 'full' to feed debaters the entire detailed reports (legacy, pricier).

us.label: US market
us._gold_note: GLD = SPDR Gold Shares, a gold-price ETF proxy. Spot/futures symbols like XAUUSD=X and GC=F are rejected by the framework's ticker path hardening. Swap to 2840.HK (HK-listed gold ETF) if you want gold in the HK run instead.

schedule._comment: Used with --schedule. The digest fires 1h before each open, in each run's own timezone (DST handled). calendar (pandas-market-calendars, optional) makes firing holiday-aware; weekdays_only is the fallback.

macro._comment: Market-wide macro/crash-risk context. fred_api_key (or --fred-key / FRED_API_KEY env) enables HY OAS + Sahm Rule. manual_overrides: optional hand-entered values for the most fragile MONTHLY scrapes (a hand value stays valid for weeks); leave null to scrape live. Set as_of to the date you entered them so a stale value shows ' · manual (as of …)' in the report.
